SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces

Interface MessageI

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
Message
public interface MessageI extends Serializable
The interface MessageI declares the signatures of methods to be implemented by messages transmitted through the publication/subscription system.

Description

Invariants

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-01-20

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    MessageI.PropertyI
    The interface PropertyI declares the signatures of methods to be implemented by properties objects put on messages.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MessageI
    copy()
    copy the message i.e., make a deep copy of the message up to the properties values and the payload that is not copied but simply referenced by the new message.
    Serializable
    getPayload()
    return the payload of this message.
    MessageI.PropertyI[]
    getProperties()
    return the array of properties defined by this message.
    Serializable
    getPropertyValue(String name)
    return the value associated with name in this message.
    Instant
    getTimeStamp()
    return the time stamp of this message.
    boolean
    propertyExists(String name)
    return true if name is the name of an existing property on the message.
    void
    putProperty(String name, Serializable value)
    add the property on this message.
    void
    removeProperty(String name)
    remove the property name from the message.
    void
    setPayload(Serializable payload)
    set the payload of this message.

  • Method Details

    • propertyExists

      boolean propertyExists(String name)
      return true if name is the name of an existing property on the message.

      Contract

       pre    name != null && !name.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      name - a potential property name to be tested.
      Returns:
      true if name is the name of an existing property on the message.

    • putProperty

      void putProperty(String name, Serializable value)
      add the property on this message.

      Contract

       pre    name != null && !name.isEmpty()
 pre    !propertyExists(name)
 post   propertyExists(name)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the property to be added.
      value - the value of the property to be added.

    • removeProperty

      void removeProperty(String name) throws UnknownPropertyException
      remove the property name from the message.

      Contract

       pre    name != null && !name.isEmpty()
 post   !propertyExists(name)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of a property to be removed.
      Throws:
      UnknownPropertyException - when name does not correspond to an existing property of this message.

    • getPropertyValue

      Serializable getPropertyValue(String name) throws UnknownPropertyException
      return the value associated with name in this message.

      Contract

       pre    name != null && !name.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of a property which value must be retrieved.
      Returns:
      the value associated with name in this message.
      Throws:
      UnknownPropertyException - when name does not correspond to an existing property of this message.

    • getProperties

      MessageI.PropertyI[] getProperties()
      return the array of properties defined by this message.

      Contract

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   return != null
      Returns:
      the array of properties defined by this message.

    • copy

      MessageI copy()
      copy the message i.e., make a deep copy of the message up to the properties values and the payload that is not copied but simply referenced by the new message.

      Contract

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   return != null
      Returns:
      a copy of this message, with the same properties and the same payload.

    • setPayload

      void setPayload(Serializable payload)
      set the payload of this message.

      Contract

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      payload - payload to be set.

    • getPayload

      Serializable getPayload()
      return the payload of this message.

      Contract

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Returns:
      the payload of this message.

    • getTimeStamp

      Instant getTimeStamp()
      return the time stamp of this message.

      Contract

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   return != null
      Returns:
      the time stamp of this message.
